content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous agent research can be repurposed as a pruning and prioritization framework for cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent long-term memory, where only memory traces that trigger sustained prediction error (the same signal that drives curious exploration) are retained and promoted to high-speed accessible working memory. This creates a self-sustaining memory system that automatically prioritizes surprising, high-information content without manual labeling overhead.
